query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `plan` enum('trial','basic','premium') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trial',
  `status` enum('trial','active','expired','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trial',
  `hasAds` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `trialEndsAt` timestamp NULL,
  `currentPeriodStart` timestamp NULL,
  `currentPeriodEnd` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pix_payments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `plan` enum('basic','premium') NOT NULL,
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `pixKey` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `txid` varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `qrCodePayload` text,
  `qrCodeImage` text,
  `status` enum('pending','paid','expired','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `expiresAt` timestamp NULL,
  `paidAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
